name: Herbalist
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — tends the wounded between clashes (Herbalists heal Wounds in Mage Knight). New archetype: fragile support. figureCandidates from Mage Knight: Resurrection (minisgallery.com) — use a figure with the Healer ability; Resurrection has no obvious dedicated healer, so these are thematic support stand-ins (editorial).

specialAction.name: Healing Herbs
specialAction.summary: Remove up to 2 Wounds total, split between this Unit and one allied Unit within yellow range. No valid target needed.

effects.text: Remove up to 1 Wound from an ally in yellow range.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, remove 1 extra Wound from an allied Unit within yellow range.

figureCandidates.name: Bonebreaker Shaman
figureCandidates.roleFit: A shaman/support caster — closest common stand-in for a healer.

figureCandidates.name: Solonavi Domineer
figureCandidates.roleFit: A support caster, if it carries a restorative power.
